creator: jhroyer@joher.com
text:
When checking the memory usage of a process like getty or telnetd or
else using ps (or top) it shows that the same process under 3.0.0
use 4-5 times more memory than the same one on 2.2.x

Fix: 

ps problem ?
kernel problem ?
How-To-Repeat: ps aux | fgrep getty

on a 2.2.x and on a 2.3.0

(getty is an example check with any other one)
